race.comment: NIKODY'S BINKS (5) scored by a big margin two back, then dropped in trip with a plugging fourth over 1262m at this track. Senior rider hops back aboard and has a good record over this track and trip. Will take some running down. ARGERICH (12) kept finding when third over the 2000m at this track two runs back, then back in trip with a disappointing seventh over 1614m here. Capable on her day and gets one more chance with the good weight drop. SEETHING CHUCK (11) tough old gelding adept in all conditions. Covered ground in the run with the 59.5kg for a plugging sixth over 1808m at Port Macquarie. Key jockey change and don't dismiss. QUICK BUCK (6) is back in the Glen Milligan yard. Jumped in distance and was beaten a long way out when eighth over 2000m at this track. Leading apprentice hops aboard and can run into the minor money. The chances don't end there.
